command: url="http://127.0.0.1:8080/JSON/core/view/version/?apikey=${ZAP_API_KEY}"; if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsS --max-time 5 "$url" | grep -q '"version"'; elif command -v wget >/dev/null 2>&1; then wget -qO- --timeout=5 "$url" | grep -q '"version"'; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 -c "import json,os,urllib.request; data=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8080/JSON/core/view/version/?apikey=' + os.environ['ZAP_API_KEY'], timeout=5)); raise SystemExit(0 if data.get('version') else 1)"; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -c "import json,os,urllib.request; data=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8080/JSON/core/view/version/?apikey=' + os.environ['ZAP_API_KEY'], timeout=5)); raise SystemExit(0 if data.get('version') else 1)"; else exit 1; fi
